articles.title: “All The GOATs Have Lost!” DJ On Ilia Topuria Losing
Bisping REACTS To Pereira vs Gane 'Back Of Head' Controversy
articles.description: Michael Bisping reacts to the controversy surrounding Ciryl Gane’s stoppage win over Alex Pereira and breaks down whether the alleged back-of-the-head shots were actually illegal. Bisping explains the official interpretation of the “back of the head” rule, why the nape of the neck is the key area referees look for, and why he believes Herb Dean made the right call. He also gives his thoughts on Pereira’s move to heavyweight, Gane’s reputation after the Tom Aspinall eye poke controversy, and what could be next for both men. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #alexpereira #cirylgane #ufcwhitehouse

articles.title: UFC White House Reflections: Is It The Right Time For Justin Gaethje To Call It A Career?
articles.description: The UFC's remarkable event at the White House produced a number of memorable moments, but amid all of the pomp and circumstance, there's a chance we may also have witnessed the final chapter in the fighting career of Justin Gaethje as he captured the undisputed lightweight title in remarkable fashion on the South Lawn.

articles.title: BISPING REACTS Inside The White House For UFC Freedom 250! | INSTANT REACTION
articles.description: Use code BISPING for 15% off Rugiet Ready: https://www.rugiet.com/bisping Michael Bisping takes you inside one of the craziest nights in UFC history as Freedom 250 goes down on the South Lawn of the White House. From backstage access, the Green Room, fighters walking out, presidential butlers, insane finishes, and live reactions to the biggest fights of the night, Bisping gives a behind-the-scenes look at a UFC event unlike anything we’ve ever seen before. Featuring reactions to Bo Nickal, Michael Chandler, Josh Hokit, Sean O’Malley, Ciryl Gane vs Alex Pereira, and a wild main event between Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje. articles.title: 'Did Hokit BLOW IT For Topuria!?' | BISPING REACTS to UFC White House Press Conference
articles.description: Michael Bisping reacts live from Washington D.C. after an unbelievable UFC White House press conference, breaking down the atmosphere, the production, the crowd, and the biggest moments from a once-in-a-lifetime fight week with Nick Peet. Bisping and the team discuss Josh Hokit stealing the show, Ilia Topuria getting emotional with Justin Gaethje, Alex Pereira facing Ciryl Gane in a massive heavyweight clash, the spectacle of the UFC at the White House, and whether this could be the biggest event the sport has ever seen. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #ufcwhitehouse #iliatopuria #justingaethje #alexpereira #cirylgane #joshhokit
